tasks.name: Execution preflight gate (feature start)
tasks.description: Run the execution preflight gate to confirm smoke/manual/CI plans are adequate before starting triads.
acceptance_criteria: Execution preflight recommendation recorded (ACCEPT or REVISE)
start_checklist: Run: make triad-orch-ensure FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution"
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0 spec, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Complete execution_preflight_report.md with ACCEPT/REVISE and required fixes
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs

tasks.name: C0 — Broker canonical resolver + CLI delegation (code)
tasks.description: Implement broker-canonical patch-only policy resolution and CLI delegation per C0 (production code only).
acceptance_criteria: Broker resolves effective policy by patch merge (defaults → global → workspace)
Workspace disabled marker prevents workspace policy discovery
Policy current show delegates effective resolution to broker
start_checklist: Run: make triad-orch-ensure FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution"
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0 spec, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution" SLICE_ID="C0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-code"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: C0 — Broker canonical resolver + CLI delegation (test)
tasks.description: Add/modify tests for broker-canonical patch-only policy resolution and CLI delegation per C0 (tests only).
acceptance_criteria: Tests enforce C0 acceptance criteria for patch-only resolution and disabled workspace semantics

Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0 spec, kickoff prompt

Run: make triad-task-start-pair FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution" SLICE_ID="C0"
end_checklist: cargo fmt
Run the targeted tests you add/touch
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-test"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: C0 — Integration core
tasks.description: Merge C0 code+tests, reconcile to spec, and get a primary-platform green state before cross-platform dispatch.
acceptance_criteria: Local integration gates are green (fmt, clippy -D warnings, relevant tests, integ-checks)
Cross-platform validation dispatch is recorded (run ids/URLs) in session_log.md
start_checklist: Run on Linux host
Run: make triad-orch-ensure FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution"
Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, C0 spec, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
Run: make triad-task-start FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution" TASK_ID="C0-integ-core"
end_checklist: Merge code+test branches into this worktree; reconcile drift to spec
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
Run relevant tests
make integ-checks
Dispatch CI compile parity: make ci-compile-parity CI_WORKFLOW_REF="feat/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution" CI_REMOTE=origin CI_CLEANUP=1 (record run id/URL)

Dispatch behavioral smoke via CI: make feature-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution" PLATFORM=behavior SMOKE_SLICE_ID="C0" RUNNER_KIND=self-hosted WORKFLOW_REF="feat/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution" REMOTE=origin CLEANUP=1 RUN_INTEG_CHECKS=1 (record run id/URL)

If any smoke platform fails: start only failing platform-fix tasks via: make triad-task-start-platform-fixes-from-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/policy-patch-only-broker-effective-resolution" SLICE_ID="C0" SMOKE_RUN_ID="<run-id>"
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="C0-integ-core"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)
